Case studies

Selected product and research work — open a project for the full write-up.

  • starmap

    A personal relationship management tool to map people, connections, and social context over time.

  • Helping low-income families in Vancouver find free and low-cost third-space activities.

  • An improved gift wrapping and card customization experience for Amazon shoppers.

  • AuroraPetCo.

    Vet-backed subscription pet pharmacy focused on chronic conditions and affordability across Canada.

  • Under NDA

    Details available upon request

    Canadian Space Agency

    Mapped satellite images across Canada for the Terrestrial Snow Mass Mission (TSMM)
